about.bio: Full-Stack Developer and DevOps Engineer with 17+ years of hands-on experience delivering production-grade web applications and scalable cloud infrastructure. I combine deep back-end expertise in Laravel and PHP with modern front-end skills in Vue.js and React to build end-to-end solutions — from database design through CI/CD pipelines to live monitoring on AWS. Over the course of my career I have shipped enterprise CRM/ERP platforms, high-traffic e-commerce stores and containerized microservices for companies ranging from startups to established brands. I am an active open-source contributor, maintaining public DevOps toolkits and reusable Docker environments used by the developer community. Outside of tech, I serve as a Volunteer Firefighter, which has instilled a strong sense of discipline, teamwork and crisis management.

exp.desc1: Architected and maintain a suite of customer-facing web applications powering one of Poland's leading meal-kit brands. Engineered multi-service infrastructure on AWS (EC2, ECS, RDS, S3, CloudFront) to ensure high availability during peak-traffic campaigns. Designed zero-downtime CI/CD pipelines with Docker and GitHub Actions, cutting average deployment time significantly. Introduced Inertia.js-driven SPAs with Vue.js and React, improving page-load performance and user engagement across the platform.
exp.desc2: Lead the ongoing development of a bespoke CRM/ERP platform built with Laravel and Livewire, streamlining sales, inventory and customer workflows for the organization. Migrated legacy on-premise servers to a containerized Docker environment on AWS, improving deployment reliability and reducing infrastructure costs. Modernized a high-traffic PrestaShop storefront — optimizing database queries, upgrading modules and hardening security. Administer Linux-based production servers, managing backups, monitoring and incident response.
exp.desc3: Spearheaded the development of new CRM modules that automated lead tracking and client communication, reducing manual data-entry overhead for the sales team. Delivered full-stack features across Laravel, Vue.js, React and Livewire codebases, consistently shipping ahead of sprint deadlines. Integrated third-party APIs (payment gateways, shipping providers, analytics) to extend platform capabilities. Collaborated closely with product owners to translate business requirements into technical specifications and scalable architecture.
exp.desc4: Contributed to multiple client-facing projects within a fast-paced agency environment, building responsive web applications using Laravel, Vue.js, React and Inertia.js. Participated in code reviews and architectural discussions, helping the team adopt best practices for component-driven front-end development. Delivered pixel-perfect UI implementations with Bootstrap, ensuring cross-browser compatibility and accessibility compliance.
exp.desc5: Developed and maintained production web applications for diverse clients, leveraging Laravel with Vue.js and Livewire. Introduced Tailwind CSS as the design-system foundation, accelerating UI development cycles and ensuring consistent branding across projects. Wrote comprehensive test suites and contributed to internal coding standards documentation.
exp.desc6: Founded and operated Blue-NET, a web development practice serving local and regional businesses for over a decade. Delivered 50+ websites and e-commerce stores on PrestaShop, WordPress and Joomla, handling everything from client discovery to deployment and ongoing maintenance. Progressively adopted modern frameworks — migrating projects from CodeIgniter and Yii to Laravel — demonstrating continuous learning and technology leadership. Managed hosting infrastructure, domain portfolios and client relationships end-to-end.

edu.institution2: Secondary School Complex in Bystrzyca Klodzka
edu.desc1: Engineering degree in Computer Network Administration. Coursework in operating systems, network protocols, security and database management. Completed a thesis project focused on practical server infrastructure design.
edu.desc2: Information management profile with a strong foundation in IT fundamentals, programming basics and computer hardware. Early exposure to web technologies that sparked a lasting career in software development.

portfolio.desc1: Feature-rich e-commerce platform serving the firefighting community. Built on PrestaShop with a fully custom theme, tailored product configurators, and integrations with payment and shipping providers — driving steady revenue growth since launch.
portfolio.desc2: Enterprise-grade CRM/ERP system for end-to-end sales management, including pipeline tracking, invoicing and inventory control. Built with Laravel, Livewire and Flux UI; integrates seamlessly with an online storefront and third-party trade software.
portfolio.desc3: Entrepreneurial venture providing full-service web development, managed hosting and Linux server administration to small and medium businesses over a 10-year span.
portfolio.desc4: Open-source DevOps knowledge base featuring battle-tested patterns, automation scripts and CI/CD pipeline configurations. Designed to help teams adopt infrastructure-as-code best practices quickly.
portfolio.desc5: Production-ready Docker environment for Laravel projects, pre-configured with Nginx, PHP-FPM and MySQL. Enables developers to spin up consistent local and staging environments in minutes.
portfolio.desc6: Lightweight timesheet and vacation management application tailored for small businesses. Simplifies hour logging, leave requests and team availability tracking with an intuitive, mobile-friendly interface.
